phrases.text_local: Onde fica o posto de socorros?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW POHSH-too DIH soo-KOH-roosh?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao fiscal da praia ou ao atendente do bar.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW feesh-KAHL DUH PREYEUH OHW OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DOO BAHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the beach inspector or the bar staff.

responses.english: Ask the beach inspector or the bar staff.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW feesh-KAHL DUH PREYEUH OHW OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DOO BAHR.
responses.french: Pergunte ao fiscal da praia ou ao atendente do bar.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o início do Caminho Costeiro?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW ee-NEES-yoo DOO kuh-MEE-nyoo koosh-TAY-roo?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Caminho Costeiro a partir da Marginal.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW kuh-MEE-nyoo koosh-TAY-roo AH puh-ruh-TEER DUH muh-ruh-zhee-NAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs for the Coastal Path from the Marginal.

responses.english: Follow the signs for the Coastal Path from the Marginal.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW kuh-MEE-nyoo koosh-TAY-roo AH puh-ruh-TEER DUH muh-ruh-zhee-NAHL.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Caminho Costeiro a partir da Marginal.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao atendente do aluguer de espreguiçadeiras.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DOO uh-loo-GEHR DIH shpreh-gee-suh-DAY-ruhsh.

responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DOO uh-loo-GEHR DIH shpreh-gee-suh-DAY-ruhsh.
responses.french: Pergunte ao atendente do aluguer de espreguiçadeiras.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the coastal path starts
phrases.cultural_note: The coastal trail connects major beaches and begins near urban access points.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Caminho Costeiro.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW kuh-MEE-nyoo koosh-TAY-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Coastal Path.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Coastal Path.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW kuh-MEE-nyoo koosh-TAY-roo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Caminho Costeiro.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the shower cabins are
phrases.text_local: Onde estão as cabines de duche?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN UHSH kuh-BEE-nihsh DIH DOO-shih?
phrases.cultural_note: Outdoor showers are standard amenities installed near Portuguese beach access paths.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para as Cabines de Duche.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH kuh-BEE-nihsh DIH DOO-shih.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the shower cabins.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the shower cabins.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH kuh-BEE-nihsh DIH DOO-shih.
responses.french: Siga as placas para as Cabines de Duche.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the beach bar is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o bar da praia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW BAHR DUH PREYEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: Beach bars in Portugal typically operate from fixed counters near the main access points.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Bar da Praia.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW BAHR DUH PREYEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the beach bar.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the beach bar.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW BAHR DUH PREYEUH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Bar da Praia.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o posto de socorros?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW POHSH-too DIH soo-KOH-roosh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Posto de Socorros na praia.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW POHSH-too DIH soo-KOH-roosh NUH PREYEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the lifeguard station on the beach.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the lifeguard station on the beach.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW POHSH-too DIH soo-KOH-roosh NUH PREYEUH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Posto de Socorros na praia.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the beach bar is
phrases.text_local: Pode indicar a localização do bar de praia?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih een-dee-KAHR AH loo-kuh-lee-zuh-SOWN DOO BAHR DIH PREYEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: Beach bars are strategically positioned to oversee designated swimming zones.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga as placas para o Bar da Praia.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW BAHR DUH PREYEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the signs to the Beach Bar.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the signs to the Beach Bar.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW BAHR DUH PREYEUH.
responses.french: Bom dia, siga as placas para o Bar da Praia.

phrases.cultural_note: Sunbed rentals are managed by licensed concessionaires positioned along the shoreline.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Aluguer de Espreguiçadeiras.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW uh-loo-GEHR DIH shpreh-gee-suh-DAY-ruhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Sunbed Rental.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Sunbed Rental.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW uh-loo-GEHR DIH shpreh-gee-suh-DAY-ruhsh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Aluguer de Espreguiçadeiras.

phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ayng-KOHNGT-roo UHSH kuh-BEE-nihsh DIH DOO-shih?
phrases.cultural_note: Foot showers are typically installed at beach exits for visitor convenience.

phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW POHSH-too DIH soo-KOH-roosh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Posto de Socorros.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW POHSH-too DIH soo-KOH-roosh.
